title: astragalus rudolffii
intro: Astragalus rudolffii, also known as Mongolian milkvetch or Astragalus, is a plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in Chinese and Tibetan cultures, for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, making it beneficial for various health conditions. Astragalus is commonly prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tea to help boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders.
